name.en-US: Against the Errors of the Greeks

description.en-US: A treatise prepared at the request of Pope Urban IV on the doctrinal points in dispute between the Latin Church and the Greek East — the procession of the Holy Spirit, the primacy of the Roman pontiff, purgatory, and the use of unleavened bread — in view of a possible reunion.
description.la: Tractatus, Urbano IV petente, de capitibus dogmaticis inter Ecclesiam Latinam et Orientem Graecum disputatis — processione Spiritus Sancti, primatu Romani pontificis, purgatorio, azymis — in spe unionis.

sources.description: Translation drawn from the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain), mirrored from dhspriory.org via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.

title.en-US: Chapter 1 — How the Son is understood to be related to the Father as something caused to its cause.

title.en-US: Chapter 17 — How the divine essence is to be understood as conceived and born.
